title: Tax file number
description: How to apply for a tax file number (TFN), update your TFN details, where to find your TFN and what to do if it's stolen.
keywords: tax file number australia, Tax file number (TFN), Individual, Tax, file, number, TFN, Application, electronic, forms, residents, individuals, living, Australia, residents, poi, proof, identity, enquiry, TFN enquiry, Free TFN, TFN australia, TFN number, ato tfn

child_links.title: What is a tax file number?
child_links.description: Find out why you need a TFN, where to find it and how to keep your TFN and personal details safe.

child_links.title: Apply for a TFN
child_links.description: How to apply for a TFN online or by paper depending on your circumstances and residency status. It is free to apply.

child_links.title: Lost or stolen TFN
child_links.description: Find your tax file number online with ATO online services. Tell us as soon as possible if your TFN is stolen or misused.

child_links.title: Update your TFN registration details
child_links.description: Check how you can update your TFN registration details, including your name, date of birth, bank details and gender.

child_links.title: Identity documents
child_links.description: The identity documents you need to apply for a TFN, ABN or register for GST and who can certify your original documents.

source_title: Tax file number | Australian Taxation Office
source_description: Find your tax file number online with ATO online services. Tell us as soon as possible if your TFN is stolen or misused. Update your TFN registration details.
